message:
feat(ufunc): resolve einsum ellipsis to explicit broadcast dims

Previous implementation silently stripped '.' from subscripts so
"...ij,...jk->...ik" errored with 'subscript has N indices but operand
has M dimensions' whenever any input carried an ellipsis. Now each
'...' is expanded to Private-Use-Area placeholder labels (U+E000+)
derived from the operand's unlabeled trailing dimensions; all operand
ellipses must share shape. Implicit output places broadcast labels
first (NumPy convention). Stray '.' outside ellipsis and multiple
ellipses per subscript are rejected. Added 5 unit tests (batch
matmul, transpose last two axes, implicit placement, stray dot,
shape mismatch).

Also picks up a concurrent tensorsolve return-shape refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
